questions.question: Consider a parallelized for loop in C++ with 4 threads. The loop iterates from 0 to 15. Determine which iterations will be executed by thread T1, thread T2, thread T3, and thread T4. Assume the loop is divided evenly among the threads. If not, specify the number of iterations for each thread.
questions.hint: Understand how threads are assigned to iterations in a parallelized for loop

questions.question: A parallelized for loop in Java is used to iterate over an array of 10 elements. The loop is divided into 3 parts, and each part is executed by a different thread. Determine which 3 elements of the array will be processed by thread T1, thread T2, and thread T3. Assume the array indices are 0, 1, 2, ..., 9.
questions.hint: Understand how thread assignment works in a parallelized for loop

questions.question: A parallelized for loop in Python is used to iterate over a list of 17 elements. The loop is divided into 4 parts, and each part is executed by a different thread. Determine which 4 parts of the list will be processed by thread T1, thread T2, thread T3, and thread T4. Assume the list indices are 0, 1, 2, ..., 16.
questions.hint: Understand how thread assignment works in a parallelized for loop
